director.name: 奥利维尔·拉克谢 Óliver Laxe

this_title: O salvaxe leva o seu tempo
introduction: Director: Óliver LaxeCollaboration: Nadia AcimiSynopsis: "Making a film is wanting to tame the wild, to capture it. It attracts and stimulates us: a wild world, a wild life, a wild love... This film is a portrait of indomitable beings."Duration: 26' 44''
chinese_title: O salvaxe leva o seu tempo
